goal: Promote only the minimum ResponseAPI core subset that has clear live evidence and keep all wider helper surface deferred.
successCriteria: ResponseAPI core subset is explicitly narrowed to create/followUp/createTextResult/followUpTextResult.
Nightly response-api evidence becomes the only promotion basis for this package.
Doctor, scorecard, and verification report describe ResponseAPI beta status as a subset promotion, not a whole-surface promotion.
explicitlyOutOfScope: No promotion of JSON, messages, reasoning, chat-completion, or stream helper families.
